category_title: Desktop pencil sharpener with hand crank and drawer
prompt: A classroom desktop pencil sharpener with a cast-metal body, a side hand crank with a spinner knob, a front shavings drawer, and a small size-selector dial above the pencil entry. The crank rotates continuously on its side shaft, the spinner knob rotates continuously on its own local axle, the drawer slides prismatically out from the front of the housing, and the selector dial rotates continuously on the front face. The pencil entry must be a real hollow hole leading into a believable internal sharpening cavity, not a solid front wall with a shallow dimple. Desk-scale school supply.
label: Classroom sharpener with hollow pencil port

category_title: Desktop pencil sharpener with hand crank and drawer
prompt: A compact office pencil sharpener with a rounded shell, a folding side crank, a lower pullout waste tray, and a hinged dust flap covering the pencil port. The crank rotates on a side axle, the tray slides prismatically out from the lower front of the body, and the dust flap rotates upward on a small hinge above the pencil opening. The pencil port should read as an actual open hollow channel into the sharpener body with visible depth, not as a filled solid face. Small desktop office-tool scale.
label: Office sharpener with hollow entry

category_title: Desktop pencil sharpener with hand crank and drawer
prompt: A premium desktop pencil sharpener with a rectangular body, a large side crank, a front shavings drawer with a finger pull, and a circular point-adjustment dial surrounding the pencil entry. The crank rotates continuously on its supported side hub, the drawer slides prismatically along the body depth axis, and the point-adjustment dial rotates continuously around the pencil-entry axis. The pencil entry must be modeled as a true hollow opening into an internal cutter chamber rather than a shallow decorative recess. Desktop scale for a teacher's desk or studio table.
label: Premium sharpener with true hollow opening

category_title: Desktop pencil sharpener with hand crank and drawer
prompt: A suction-base pencil sharpener with a sturdy body, a side crank handle, a front waste drawer, and a locking lever under the base for fastening it to a tabletop. The crank rotates continuously on a side shaft, the front drawer slides prismatically out from the body, and the base lock lever rotates on a short pivot beneath the housing. Make the pencil insertion hole an actual hollow through-opening into the sharpening cavity with believable wall thickness around it, not a solid block with a fake hole mark. Compact school or workshop bench scale.
label: Suction base sharpener with hollow insertion hole

category_title: Desktop pencil sharpener with hand crank and drawer
prompt: A vintage-style desktop pencil sharpener with a tall metal housing, a rear hand crank, a front shavings drawer, and a small sliding selector next to the pencil port. The crank rotates continuously at the back of the body, the drawer translates prismatically out from the front, and the selector slides prismatically along a short guide beside the entry opening. The pencil port needs to be a genuine hollow hole with visible depth into the sharpener mechanism area, rather than a solid front surface treated as closed geometry. Desktop classroom scale.
label: Vintage sharpener with visible hollow port
